title: NQBlade Trading Algorithm
author: Some_Fly_4552
selftext: Hello here’s a short comparison of my Fully Automated Trading Algorithm✌️ Developed it for 2+ years till it was finally time to let it out to a live trading account. Did quite well I would say😅🤷‍♂️ Wanna see payouts, profits, broker statements etc. Or do you want to try it out for a week (free) and see how it works performs and so on. Give me a quick DM and we will go forward👍

comments.author: d_e_g_m
comments.body: You have the alg fir the orb to test. Provide the alg (not the code) for your strategy so we can test ourselves.

replies.author: Some_Fly_4552
replies.body: You’ll get the algo and (file) aswell as a license key just dm👍
